info.title: SEPM SESSIONS API
info.description: Self-contained OpenAPI 2.0 specification for SEPM sessions endpoints.

bitMask.description: The user role mask for the web user interface. Possible values are 8 for system administrator, 4 for domain administrator, and 2 for limited administrator.

UserRole.description: User role model for the webUI login

groupRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has group rights.

policyRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has policy rights.

remoteCommandRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has the rights to send commands to clients.

reportingRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has reporting rights.

siteRights.description: Specifies whether or not the user has site rights.

bannerText.description: The banner text associated with the domain.

bannerTitle.description: The banner title associated with the domain.

clientId.description: The client id associated with the application.

clientSecret.description: The client secret associated with the application.

domain.description: The Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager domain to which the username logs on.

refreshTokenExpiration.description: Refresh token expiration value in seconds.

token.description: The access token associated with the user.

tokenExpiration.description: The access token expiration value in seconds.

username.description: The username used to log on to Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager.
